# ⏱️Save  60 minutes daily with these WordPress shortcuts

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-02-01 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 499

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Today, I want to share with you some unknown WordPress shortcuts
that I use to save time while using the WordPress post editor.

These shortcuts have helped me reclaim a full hour each day –
that's 5 hours per work week or roughly 20 hours per month!

If you work extensively with WordPress, these shortcuts can help
you streamline your process and focus on what truly matters:
creating great content and growing your business.

Unfortunately, not many users are aware of these hidden gems,
which makes their WordPress user experience miserable.

👉 Learn to use WordPress editor & save 60 minutes daily! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..4x1xelPIJeRY92Js8uhET0oPdxtIu1YnxOc1x0LOrvE )
 👈

Enhance Your WordPress Editor!
------------------------------

Now that you’ve learned essential lessons, you might want to
enhance your WordPress experience even further.

There are countless WordPress plugins designed to supercharge the
Gutenberg editor.

Read more: 15+ Best WordPress Block Plugins 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..6TYuyBHr3LkG5ci-Ds3uCz8fWYmyK5onmyRJeRbV6VQ )


Save Even More Time!
--------------------

Business owners spend around 20 hours monthly maintaining their
WordPress sites.

By handing over WordPress maintenance 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.3mo8taFElAM4q2s4uC7SHoLYKpWwnXXXdMyF4Mkfs7c )
to experts, you can buy back these 20 hours.

That way you can worry less about your WordPress site and focus
on growing your business.

Cheers,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
